---
name: New mindset proposal
about: Propose a new software analysis mindset/skill
title: "[Mindset] "
labels: [enhancement, mindset]
assignees: []
---

## Proposed Mindset Name

Name of the mindset and suggested slash command (for example, `/lovelace`).

## Category

- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Debugging
- [ ] Evolution
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Strategy
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] New category (describe below)

## Problem It Solves

What recurring software analysis problem does this mindset address?

## Core Principles

List 3-5 principles that define this mindset.

## Proposed Output Structure

Describe the expected analysis/report format.

## Example Use Cases

Provide 1-3 concrete scenarios where this mindset adds value.

## Draft Content (Optional)

Include a draft of the mindset file if available.
